title: cryptantha humilis var. commixta
intro: Cryptantha humilis var. commixta is a rare and lesser-known species of flowering plant in the borage family, native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. The plant's extracts have been found to have various health benefits, including antimicrobial and antioxidant effects, which can help to protect against infections and promote overall well-being. Cryptantha humilis var. commixta can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to support skin health and immune function.
